prompt: I just registered my Node.js/TypeScript webapp project. Run /rawgentic:setup to configure it. The workspace file is at /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/workspace-webapp.json and the project is at /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/projects/webapp. When asked for confirmation, say 'yes' or 'looks good' to approve each section. Save the generated .rawgentic.json to /tmp/rawgentic-test-fixtures/projects/webapp/.rawgentic.json

assertions.name: detects-postgres
assertions.description: database section exists with type postgres

assertions.name: detects-jwt-security
assertions.description: security section exists with JWT auth mechanism
